observations.summary: The object felt solid, balanced, and real in his hand, symbolizing a tangible connection to his father.

evidence.quote: It felt right in his hand—solid, balanced, real.

observations.notes: This observation highlights the physical and emotional significance of the object as a link to the past.

observations.summary: The object represents a connection to the man his father had been, despite the father's current loss or absence.

evidence.quote: A connection to the man his father had been, even if that man was lost now.

observations.notes: This observation captures the emotional and psychological motif of loss and remembrance.
